title: Jamaican Frittata
description: A spicy twist on the classic Italian dish, packed with flavor and perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the diced bell peppers and cook until tender.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, Jamaican seasoning blend, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked bell peppers in the skillet.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese over the top of the eggs.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata out of the skillet onto a plate and slice into wedges.
